title: Advance ticket sales for You Are Not Alone sol
display_title: Advance ticket sales for You Are Not Alone sol
wikitext:
[]: Advance ticket sales for "You Are (Not) Alone" sol             Quote Post by EVA Does It Best » Fri Jun 01, 2007 12:19 am in a listing on the production diary for the rebuild movies on yahoo Japan, i came across an interesting post which states that advance tickets for Rebuild 1 is sold out and rebuild 2 tickets are already on sale. i read the garbled babel fish translation, here's what it says. "That advance sale ticket 1st feature, sold completely with entire country, the information entered. Everyone whom you purchase, thank you truly. With simultaneously, it is advancing also advance sale ticket 2nd feature plan steadily. Presently it is in the midst of ardent job even inside the studio. This please has enjoyed, please." UPDATE: according to the same blog diary, the tickets (remember this is a ROUGH translation) will be 3D. Not sure how it means, but it said the advance tickets are "larger" and has "become three-dimensional printing specification" If anybody could search ebay or yahoo Japan that'd be nice to find out what these advance tickets look like. here's the original Japanese text. 前売りチケット第１弾が、全国で完売したとの一報が入ってきました。ご購入頂いた皆さま、本当にありがとうございました。 と同時に、前売りチケット第２弾の企画も着々と進行しています。現在スタジオ内でも鋭意作業中です。こちらも、どうぞお楽しみにしていて下さい。

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Fri Jun 01, 2007 12:25 am O_O Wow. So I guess the only people who'll be able to see it theatrically are the ones who've already ordered tickets?

[]:             Quote Post by Tokpile Quohog » Fri Jun 01, 2007 12:37 am I wonder how much you can Ebay those tickets for. :twisted:

[]:             Quote Post by Vampire Killer » Fri Jun 01, 2007 12:41 am So, are any of you gonna fly to Japan to go watch the new animated movies? Just curious.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Fri Jun 01, 2007 12:52 am Vampire Killer wrote: So, are any of you gonna fly to Japan to go watch the new animated movies? Just curious.

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Fri Jun 01, 2007 6:50 am Vampire Killer wrote: So, are any of you gonna fly to Japan to go watch the new animated movies? Just curious.

[]:             Quote Post by Executor » Fri Jun 01, 2007 8:22 am THE Hal E. Burton 9000 wrote: Vampire Killer wrote: So, are any of you gonna fly to Japan to go watch the new animated movies? Just curious.

[]:             Quote Post by Kaysow » Fri Jun 01, 2007 10:38 am Ornette wrote: I plan to. As soon as the flight dates get finalized (my GF is the one looking for tickets, plus she needs to take vacation days), my friend in Nagoya will buy the tickets.

[]:             Quote Post by Vampire Killer » Fri Jun 01, 2007 11:12 am I've always wanted to visit Japan, but I don't have the time and money to go too.

[]: ^_^ \/,,             Quote Post by chiefen » Fri Jun 01, 2007 11:53 am Man, I would've wanted to see End of Evangelion in cinema. What an experience!

[]:             Quote Post by Kaysow » Fri Jun 01, 2007 1:13 pm hahaha I did =) first encounter with Eva too. It was amusing, but we ruined the film for everyone else with commentary and laughter. Jag och en polare var dÃ¤r, men vi var inte sÃ¤rskilt insatta i hela animehÃ¤rvan. De visade Evangelion, som vi hÃ¶rt talas om, sÃ¥ vi tÃ¤nkte ge den en chans. []:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Jun 01, 2007 1:56 pm Like somebody else mentioned, if I had the time and money, I'd so do it. ; And yes, seeing EoE in theaters would have ruled . *_* At least there's always the internet for watching. (And of course, actually buying the films WHEN they're released statewise.) Oh and FYI, I plan on typing up the transcript of June 2007 Newtype USA at some point this weekend. It has one page about Webuild Glow-in-the-Dark Yui-sama and 2 pages on Petite Eva (yes that's what its called), and it mentions how an animated work is POSSIBLE, but for now its just those figures.

[]:             Quote Post by EVA Does It Best » Fri Jun 01, 2007 3:23 pm Ornette wrote: Vampire Killer wrote: So, are any of you gonna fly to Japan to go watch the new animated movies? Just curious.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Fri Jun 01, 2007 4:06 pm The theatre experience was mainly what I was after (that and Akihabara and maybe a JGTC race at Suzuka). I actually planned on watching it twice and have my friend summarize the dialogue the second time around but I don't think my GF would humor me a second time, since Evangelion wasn't really an anime that she's into: http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?p=64267#64267

[]:             Quote Post by Opteron-O3 » Fri Jun 01, 2007 4:59 pm They should do a US Theater release, they could possibly do just as good. You never know.

[]:             Quote Post by Tokpile Quohog » Fri Jun 01, 2007 5:00 pm If they released it here, all the Rei fanbois would've bought out all the tickets before we "normal" people can get them.

[]:             Quote Post by Opteron-O3 » Fri Jun 01, 2007 5:02 pm Tokpile Quohog wrote: If they released it here, all the Rei fanbois would've bought out all the tickets before we "normal" people can get them.

[]:             Quote Post by EVA Does It Best » Sat Jun 02, 2007 4:00 pm Opteron-O3 wrote: They should do a US Theater release, they could possibly do just as good. You never know.

[]:             Quote Post by Tokpile Quohog » Sat Jun 02, 2007 4:50 pm EVA Does It Best wrote: what about the Shinji fanboys, they're everywhere on these forums.

[]:             Quote Post by Executor » Sat Jun 02, 2007 4:57 pm Tokpile Quohog wrote: EVA Does It Best wrote: what about the Shinji fanboys, they're everywhere on these forums.
